def process_items(data_source):
    raw = data_source.fetch()
    items = [transform(x) for x in raw]
    total = sum(items)
    average = sum(items) / len(items)
    return total, average

def find_matches(records):
    candidates = [r for r in records if r["score"] > 50]
    count = len(candidates)
    top = candidates[:10]
    return count, top

def aggregate_metrics(logs):
    entries = [parse_line(line) for line in logs]
    valid = [e for e in entries if e is not None]
    total_count = len(entries)
    return valid, total_count
